messages.author: Deakia!
messages.text: Hello, I am trying to connect additional functions to my Heltec V4 running Meshcore, and I am struggling to figure out how it is done. I am used to Meshtastic, where GPIO Pins for Buzzers, Vibration and external buttons can be configured within the companion app. I am attempting to hook up a Vibration Motor for when recieving messages, and a Rotary Encoder for selecting "Quick messages"
messages.content_html: Hello, I am trying to connect additional functions to my Heltec V4 running Meshcore, and I am struggling to figure out how it is done. I am used to Meshtastic, where GPIO Pins for Buzzers, Vibration and external buttons can be configured within the companion app. I am attempting to hook up a Vibration Motor for when recieving messages, and a Rotary Encoder for selecting "Quick messages"

messages.author: Nietschy
messages.text: it is not in the FW yet, not thinking about Companion App. I hackes something for my repeater and made a PR for it. but thats far away from your requests
